en.text: O descendant of Bharat
Of the two
by the knowledgeable
it goes to enter another body
those of poor understanding
extend downwards as the planes of human, animal, and lower species
the branches face downwards, representing all beings from Lord Brahmā down to the lowest species
dedicated to self-realisation
I am situated as the indwelling monitor, the Supersoul
and I alone am the object to be known
In the form of Vedavyās, I am the revealer of the Vedānta
and the imperishable
to the liberated souls, too
as a secondary causal factor, as the search to enjoy the fruits of actions, have extended
and the disappearance of both
axe of detachment acquired from sādhu-saṅga, association of saints
of the Aśvattha tree representing this world
and it is endless (for those who desire the independence to enjoy the fruits of their actions)
perishable tree of the material world
the intelligent persons of fine theistic temperament
the four types of foodstuffs
The ritualistic verses of the Vedas
from the dualities
with the sharp
this stubbornly rooted (in aversion to the Supreme Lord)
taking this to heart
as the Supreme Person
in association with the senses and their objects
nourished by the three modes of nature
within the heart
free from the defect of unholy association
Persons with the eyes of wisdom
According to religious and irreligious actions
and the associates of the Lord, situated in their eternally perfect nature
in the world
and also the mind
six perceptual senses including the mind
in the human plane
nor the moon
Having become free from pride and delusion
the Supersoul, Akṣara-puruṣ, or the Supreme Imperishable Personality
one should approach for shelter
are represented by the protective leaves
It is said in the scriptures (when describing this material world)
through the agency of the ascending and descending vital airs
the bodies of the living beings
as Puruṣottam, the Supreme Person
by means of all the Vedas
all beings, from Lord Brahmā down to the lowest stationary beings
that knower of complete essential truth
or residing in the body
known as joy and sorrow
Its branches, representing the living beings
That is My
the holy feet of Lord Viṣṇu
when departing the body
the power of digestion
is a knower of the Vedas
and the knower of the meaning of the Vedas
and in the Vedas
with shoots, representing the objects of the senses
the objects of the senses – sound, etc
as the wind
having reached that plane from which
and which is in fire
and which is in the moon
emanates from the sun
the soul, as master of the body
purport of all the scriptures
“The roots are uppermost as it is rooted in aversion to the highest principle, the Supreme Lord
and upwards, as the planes of higher celestial beings

ru.text: пребывающие в мире Брахмана (согласно словарю «Амаракош́а» слово «кӯт̣астха» означает «тот, чья форма не меняется с течением времени» (ка̄ла-вйа̄пӣ са кӯт̣а-стхах̣ эка-рӯпатайа̄ ту йах̣))
